comment.body:
This issue has been automatically marked as stale because it has been open for 3 days with no activity.
Unfortunately, our resources are limited and we can not always take the time to respond to requests about websites that are not popular enough. The issue will be closed if no further activity occurs.
Please note, that AdGuard Filters is an open-source project that is used by different content blockers and we welcome contributions. If you have some technical knowledge about how websites work, you are welcome to create a pull request following [these instructions](https://github.com/AdguardTeam/AdguardFilters/blob/master/CONTRIBUTING.md).

comment.body:
This issue has been automatically marked as stale because it has been open for 3 days with no activity.
Unfortunately, our resources are limited and we can not always take the time to respond to requests about websites that are not popular enough. The issue will be closed if no further activity occurs.
Please note, that AdGuard Filters is an open-source project that is used by different content blockers and we welcome contributions. If you have some technical knowledge about how websites work, you are welcome to create a pull request following [these instructions](https://github.com/AdguardTeam/AdguardFilters/blob/master/CONTRIBUTING.md).

issue.title: smbc-wevox.co.jp
issue.body:
### Issue URL (Incorrect Blocking)
[https://smbc-wevox.co.jp](https://adguardteam.github.io/AnonymousRedirect/redirect.html?url=https%3A%2F%2Fsmbc-wevox.co.jp)

### Comment
> フィッシングサイトとしてマークされ、AdGuard DNSやAdGuardブラウジング・セキュリティでブロックされていますが、SMBC（日本最大の銀行グループ）系列の企業の公式サイトと思われます。
> 参考：
> https://forbesjapan.com/articles/detail/73795
> 
> 
> この他に以下も同様に誤認ブロックと思われます。
> 
> daieikagakuseiki.co.jp　機械系メーカーの公式サイトです
> 2x2landgarage.jp　ウェブ制作企業の公式サイトです
> pedestrian.jp　ファッション小売店の公式サイトです
> kodera.jp　歯科医院の公式サイトです



### Screenshots
<details>
  <summary>Screenshot 1</summary>

  ![Screenshot 1](https://cdn.adguardcdn.com/sitereports/njrhgiinp40k00gsgcskc8cs0osckksohy8mo8wkog.png?nc=1)

</details>

issue.title: Inquiry Regarding Website Access Issue in AdGuard Environment
issue.body:
### Prerequisites

- [x] I checked the documentation and found no answer;
- [x] I checked to make sure that this issue has not already been filed;
- [x] This is not an ad/bug report.

### Problem description

We operate an advertising network called ACROSS ADN, and we are reaching out because one of our clients reported an issue related to AdGuard while attempting to run advertisements through our network.

After installing the ADN script on the following website, users who are using AdGuard experienced an issue where the website could not be accessed:

https://www.adventurer.co.kr/

At the moment, the ADN script has been removed from the website, and the site is now accessible again.

Below are the environments where the access issue was observed.

[Access Issue]

PC

Website cannot be accessed in browsers with the AdGuard extension installed

iOS

Website cannot be accessed in browsers such as Safari and Chrome

Android

Website cannot be accessed in browsers such as Samsung Internet and Chrome

We would like to ask the following:

Is it possible that a website becomes inaccessible in an AdGuard environment due to an advertising network script?

If this situation can occur, are there any recommended ways to prevent or resolve this issue?

For your reference, we have attached the ADN script file.

We would appreciate your review and any guidance you can provide.

[ADN Script Integration Guide (1).docx](https://github.com/user-attachments/files/26199385/ADN.Script.Integration.Guide.1.docx)


### Proposed solution

If this situation can occur, are there any recommended ways to prevent or resolve this issue?

### Additional information

_No response_

issue.title: montrealgazette.com

labels.name: A: Problematic
labels.description: Issues, which cannot be resolved easily

issue.body:
# Sorry. The website is infected by AdShield, Inc.

Unfortunately, It is complicated to resolve with a regular adblock rule because the website is being protected by service of Ad-Shield that is an anti-adblock company.

## Userscript Installation
Please block Ad-Shield advertisement by installing [tinyShield userscript](https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield).
Please check its installation guideline written in English by visiting [this URL](https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield/blob/main/README.md).

If you can understand Korean language, please refer https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield/blob/main/README.ko.md.

<details>
<summary>Detailed description for iOS users</summary>

1. Install [**Usercripts**](https://apps.apple.com/us/app/userscripts/id1463298887) app
2. Enable **Usercripts** extension in Safari settings
	* iOS 18+: `System settings` => `Apps` => `Safari` => `Extensions`
	* iOS 17 and older: `System settings` => `Safari` => `Extensions`
	Find **Usercripts**, enable it and allow `On other sites` permission
3. Open the [tinyShield ](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@filteringdev/tinyshield@latest/dist/tinyShield.user.js) userscript URL in browser
4. Press the extensions icon in the address bar of Safari and select Userscripts 
5. Tap to install
6. In opened popup, scroll down and press Install button
7. Done.

</details>

## Still Have a Problem?
An issue is occurred when the userscript is applied, please report to [this issue tracker](https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield/issues).

labels.description: Issues, which cannot be resolved easily

issue.body:
# Sorry. The website is infected by AdShield, Inc.

Unfortunately, It is complicated to resolve with a regular adblock rule because the website is being protected by service of Ad-Shield that is an anti-adblock company.

## Userscript Installation
Please block Ad-Shield advertisement by installing [tinyShield userscript](https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield).
Please check its installation guideline written in English by visiting [this URL](https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield/blob/main/README.md).

If you can understand Korean language, please refer https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield/blob/main/README.ko.md.

<details>
<summary>Detailed description for iOS users</summary>

1. Install [**Usercripts**](https://apps.apple.com/us/app/userscripts/id1463298887) app
2. Enable **Usercripts** extension in Safari settings
	* iOS 18+: `System settings` => `Apps` => `Safari` => `Extensions`
	* iOS 17 and older: `System settings` => `Safari` => `Extensions`
	Find **Usercripts**, enable it and allow `On other sites` permission
4. Open the [tinyShield ](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@filteringdev/tinyshield@latest/dist/tinyShield.user.js) userscript URL in browser
5. Press the extensions icon in the address bar of Safari and select Userscripts 
6. Tap to install
7. In opened popup, scroll down and press Install button
8. Done.

</details>

## Still Have a Problem?
An issue is occurred when the userscript is applied, please report to [this issue tracker](https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield/issues).

issue.title: Inquiry Regarding Website Access Issue in AdGuard Environment

labels.name: A: In progress
labels.description: Work on the issue is in progress

labels.name: A: Waiting for data
labels.description: Waiting for more information from the user

issue.body:
### Prerequisites

- [x] I checked the documentation and found no answer;
- [x] I checked to make sure that this issue has not already been filed;
- [x] This is not an ad/bug report.

### Problem description

We operate an advertising network called ACROSS ADN, and we are reaching out because one of our clients reported an issue related to AdGuard while attempting to run advertisements through our network.

After installing the ADN script on the following website, users who are using AdGuard experienced an issue where the website could not be accessed:

https://www.adventurer.co.kr/

At the moment, the ADN script has been removed from the website, and the site is now accessible again.

Below are the environments where the access issue was observed.

[Access Issue]

PC

Website cannot be accessed in browsers with the AdGuard extension installed

iOS

Website cannot be accessed in browsers such as Safari and Chrome

Android

Website cannot be accessed in browsers such as Samsung Internet and Chrome

We would like to ask the following:

Is it possible that a website becomes inaccessible in an AdGuard environment due to an advertising network script?

If this situation can occur, are there any recommended ways to prevent or resolve this issue?

For your reference, we have attached the ADN script file.

We would appreciate your review and any guidance you can provide.

[ADN Script Integration Guide (1).docx](https://github.com/user-attachments/files/26199385/ADN.Script.Integration.Guide.1.docx)


### Proposed solution

If this situation can occur, are there any recommended ways to prevent or resolve this issue?

### Additional information

_No response_

comment.body:
검토를 진행하기 전에, 해당 요청이 공식 담당자분께서 보내신 것임을 확인하는 절차가 필요합니다.

회사 공식 이메일 계정으로 아래 주소에 메일을 보내 주시겠어요?
• 받는 사람: [k.mu-hun@adguard.com](mailto:k.mu-hun@adguard.com)
• 참조(CC): j.w.so@adguard.com, filters@adguard.com

메일 본문에는 성함, 회사 내 직책/역할, 그리고 검토를 원하시는 차단 이슈를 간략히 기재해 주시면 됩니다.

> 이슈는 현재 ‘A: Waiting for data’로 표시되었습니다. 5일 이내에 새로운 활동이 없을 경우 자동 종료될 수 있습니다.

comment.body:
This issue has been automatically marked as stale because it has been open for 3 days with no activity.
Unfortunately, our resources are limited and we can not always take the time to respond to requests about websites that are not popular enough. The issue will be closed if no further activity occurs.
Please note, that AdGuard Filters is an open-source project that is used by different content blockers and we welcome contributions. If you have some technical knowledge about how websites work, you are welcome to create a pull request following [these instructions](https://github.com/AdguardTeam/AdguardFilters/blob/master/CONTRIBUTING.md).

issue.body:
### Issue URL (Incorrect Blocking)
 [https://login.kt.com/wamui/CusMenuMainMobile.do](https://adguardteam.github.io/AnonymousRedirect/redirect.html?url=https%3A%2F%2Flogin.kt.com%2Fwamui%2FCusMenuMainMobile.do)
### Comment
> 현상 구현 (android)
> 1. 설정 -> 연결 -> 기타 연결 설정 -> 프라이빗 DNS ->  프라이빗 DNS 공급자 호스트 이름 입력 (dns.adguard-dns.com)
> 2. 안드로이드 마이케이티 앱을 다운로드
> 3. 마이케이티 앱 로그인 실행
> 
> 
> [호출 url]
> 
> https://login.kt.com/wamui/CusMenuMainMobile.do
> 
> ▼ 
> 
> https://m.kt.com/js/common/global/mKTGlobal.js?2026031240819
> 
> ▼
> 
> https://m.kt.com/js/common/global/oms.js?version=26011401
> 
> ▼
> 
> https://login.onmas.kt.com/js/mlogCollect.js?version=26011401
> 
>  
> 
> [오류 발생 url]
> 
> <script src="https://log.onmas.kt.com/js/mlogCollect.js?version=26011401"></script>
> 
> <script src="https://log.onmas.kt.com/js/mtargetOffer.js?version=26011401"></script>
> 
>  
> 
> log.onmas.kt.com 은 kt.com에 종속된 하위도메인입니다. 
> `support@adguard.com에` 메일을 보내드렸습니다. log.onmas.kt.com에 대한 도메인은 광고로 오탐되고 있으며 제외부탁드립니다.

issue.body:
# Sorry. The website is infected by AdShield, Inc.

Unfortunately, It is complicated to resolve with a regular adblock rule because the website is being protected by service of Ad-Shield that is an anti-adblock company.

## Userscript Installation
Please block Ad-Shield advertisement by installing [tinyShield userscript](https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield).
Please check its installation guideline written in English by visiting [this URL](https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield/blob/main/README.md).

If you can understand Korean language, please refer https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield/blob/main/README.ko.md.

<details>
<summary>Detailed description for iOS users</summary>

1. Install [**Usercripts**](https://apps.apple.com/us/app/userscripts/id1463298887) app
2. Enable **Usercripts** extension in Safari settings
	* iOS 18+: `System settings` => `Apps` => `Safari` => `Extensions`
	* iOS 17 and older: `System settings` => `Safari` => `Extensions`
	Find **Usercripts**, enable it and allow `On other sites` permission
3. Open the [tinyShield ](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@filteringdev/tinyshield@latest/dist/tinyShield.user.js) userscript URL in browser
4. Press the extensions icon in the address bar of Safari and select Userscripts 
5. Tap to install
6. In opened popup, scroll down and press Install button
7. Done.

</details>

## Still Have a Problem?
An issue is occurred when the userscript is applied, please report to [this issue tracker](https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield/issues).

comment.body:
Not reproduced on my end. Is it related to filters or AdGuard DNS? However, I don't see a rule that could block it. 

Please try following actions, then check the problem again:
1. Disable all content blockers in Safari settings and enable them again
2. Restart Safari
3. Restart AdGuard
4. Check for filters update in AdGuard
5. Disable `adblock plus`.

### Important:
<!-- **AdGuard for iOS** -->
* Do not close AdGuard window ~60 seconds, because iOS will break configuration process.
<!-- **AdGuard for Safari** -->
* The filters update process is fully completed ~10 seconds after the manual filter update check is completed.

issue.title: Tracking param "family" report

labels.name: A: In progress
labels.description: Work on the issue is in progress

issue.body:
Hi

I found websites from one owner that have same tracking param across website

Here is links
```
https://fic.fan/requests/122?premiumVisit=1
https://fic.fan/readfic/018bcf66-3558-75d9-a0a1-2620e49a66b8?premiumVisit=1
https://fanfictionero.com/readfic/149-Rayo-de-luz?premiumVisit=1
https://ficmania.com/readfic/44-Sem-t%C3%ADtulo?premiumVisit=1
https://ficbook.net/readfic/018cd126-b88f-72b6-bf65-6fc76346e118?premiumVisit=1
https://ficbook.net/requests/732279?premiumVisit=1
```

I didn't translate them all, but on English version `premiumVisit=1` counts how successful promo campaign.

comment.body:
Thanks for the report and for identifying the shared ownership pattern across these domains.

Rules will have been added to the TrackParamFilter for `fic.fan`, `fanfictionero.com`, and `ficmania.com` alongside the existing ficbook.net rule.

This issue has been automatically marked as stale because it has been open for 3 days with no activity.
Unfortunately, our resources are limited and we can not always take the time to respond to requests about websites that are not popular enough. The issue will be closed if no further activity occurs.
Please note, that AdGuard Filters is an open-source project that is used by different content blockers and we welcome contributions. If you have some technical knowledge about how websites work, you are welcome to create a pull request following [these instructions](https://github.com/AdguardTeam/AdguardFilters/blob/master/CONTRIBUTING.md).

comment.body:
> Выключал поочередно фильтры и трекинг не имеет значения!

Хм, странно. Защита от отслеживания в Firefox выключена? Если это еще сохраняется, создайте задачу [здесь](https://github.com/AdguardTeam/AdguardBrowserExtension/issues) с детальным описанием шагов повторения, в том числе, что фильтры или защиту от трекинга включать не нужно.
